title: Jamai Raja
subTitle: Realising that marriage is her only path to inheriting her father's fortune, a woman gets married to a poor man who is in desperate need of money.

title: Bhalobasi Sudhu Tomake
subTitle: Pooja is the daughter of a rich businessman, Maitreyee, who falls in love with Bijay. Things take a turn for the worse when the union leader at Maitrayee's factory is murdered and Bijay is the main suspect.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Disguised as Parvati, Narayan awaits the arrival of Tarakasura near the Shivling, while Narad presents Shiva's trident to Parvati.

title: Amar Sathi
subTitle: In Asanbani, after his father, Zamindar Pramoth Choudhary, is murdered by a corrupt manager, his son flees to Kolkata. Returning as a doctor, he seeks justice for his father's death.

title: Shibaji
subTitle: A gangster hires Shibaji to kill a judge who refuses to acquit a bribe and acquit his brother of all charges. However, Shibaji decides to quit all criminal activities when his wife attempts suicide.

title: Jiban Niye Khela
subTitle: In the distant village of Dharampur, Dr Subhankar Sanyal fights the bureaucracy and brings justice to the lives of his patients.

title: Fighter, Marbo Noy Morbo
subTitle: Surya, a college student, decides to exact revenge on a local gangster after he frames and kills his elder brother, ACP Bose.

title: Bidhatar Khela
subTitle: Biswanath's wife, Uma, accepts and loves his family members like her own. However, things change when his brother marries a rich girl and their family gets separated.

title: Bondhoo
subTitle: A devoted father stands up to obstacles and fights against all odds to win legal custody of his young son.

title: Parcel
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Parcel
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Prem Tame
subTitle: Follow the story of three friends of a small town that has love, drama and a puppy. The trio's hearts navigate in a sea of love, but which girl will the boy pick?

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Parvati has flashbacks to her previous life after touching Lord Shiva's trident. King Himavan announces his decision to arrange the marriage of Parvati and Vindhyak.

title: Uma
subTitle: Uma, a child with terminal illness, expresses her desire to see Durga Puja in Kolkata. Her father decides to go to extraordinary lengths to recreate the festival for her.

title: Sakhi Tumi Kar
subTitle: Sagar, a youngster, falls in love with Asim Dutta's daughter, Sakhi. As he is a dominant landlord in their village, he gets Sagar arrested on false charges of murder to keep him away from Sakhi.

title: Challenge 2
subTitle: ACP Abhiraj Roy, who believes his father is dead, accepts the challenge to catch a dangerous mobster. He soon discovers the source of corruption in the political nexus and decides to end it.

title: Sneher Protidan
subTitle: Mohan loves his brothers a lot and tries to ensure they do well in life. However, all of them fall prey to a misunderstanding, which risks their bond.

title: Phande Poriya Boga Kande Re
subTitle: A light-hearted wedding turns tense when buried family rivalries threaten to explode, testing the resolve of a newly arrived son-in-law.

title: Bidhilipi
subTitle: A schoolmaster's former student, Bablu, falls in love with his daughter, Minu. However, Minu is in love with another man, Alok, and wants to marry him.

title: Bibaho Obhijaan
subTitle: While Rajat's wife is extremely religious, Anupam's wife is a busy activist. Soon, Rajat and Anupam face hilarious situations in their marriage as they are frustrated with their wives.

title: Bibaho Obhijaan
subTitle: While Rajat's wife is extremely religious, Anupam's wife is a busy activist. Soon, Rajat and Anupam face hilarious situations in their marriage as they are frustrated with their wives.

title: Unishe April
subTitle: A young woman grows up in a boarding school after her father's death while her mother is busy with her dancing career. Later, she harbours resentment towards her negligent mother.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Mainavati and Himavan refuse to accept the proposal for Parvati and Lord Shiva's marriage, and Parvati agrees to fulfil their wish.

title: Chokher Bali
subTitle: After losing her husband, Binodini returns to her village and stays with a friend. Soon, she begins an affair with her friend's son, Mahendra.

title: Sabar Upare Maa
subTitle: Sumi is separated from her parents when she is a child. Years later, when Sumi gets framed for a murder she did not commit, her mother, who is a lawyer, comes to her rescue.

title: Bindaas
subTitle: Abhi falls in love with Kajol and convinces her family to get them married. However, things get complicated when Kajol's uncle asks him to kill their rival's son, who is none other than Abhi himself.

title: MLA Phatakesto
subTitle: A notorious goon aspires to become a member of the Legislative Assembly and in an attempt to do so, he gives himself seven days.

title: Kartabya
subTitle: A bridegroom disagrees to marry due to the non-payment of dowry by the bride's father. In spite of his brother's request, he remains stubborn and decides to stop his wedding.

title: Kirtaner Por Kirtan
subTitle: Kirtaner Por Kirtan

title: Indrajit
subTitle: Indrajit is an honest police officer who punishes Raja, an MLA's son, for raping a girl. The MLA then kidnaps the former's son and demands Raja's release.
